description: Ground truth for LLM document extraction eval — BPW Defence Tender Radar 2026-05-09

samples.label: TED-SE-Trailers
samples.notes: Award notice. 60M SEK actual awarded (106.6M SEK estimated). 3-year delivery contract + optional extensions. No explicit unit count. Duration from '3 år' in Swedish text.

samples.label: TED-FI-MobileContainers
samples.notes: Award notice. Value explicitly '3 416 796,00 EUR'. Quantity clearly '4 kappaletta' + option 12 (firm=4). Duration from '48 months' in classifier. Finnish-language description with English TED structure.

samples.label: TED-BE-TractorTrailer
samples.notes: Complex 2-lot award: 99 TRR + 94 STRL (Lot 1) + 18+18 (Lot 2). Lot 1 winners: IVECO + TATRA. Total value 82M EUR. Duration 10 years Lot 1. Quantity 193 = Lot 1 firm units (99+94). Models may return 229 (all lots) or 193.

samples.label: TED-RO-RefrigeratedTrailers
samples.notes: Framework agreement. Max value 6,271,995 RON. Min qty 8 / max qty 32 — ambiguous, so quantity=null. Duration 24 months. Winner 'POP INDUSTRY'. Romanian text with EU TED structure.

samples.label: CZ-NEN-CarTrailers
samples.notes: NEN portal scrape. Value clearly shown as '123,293.66' under 'ESTIMATED VALUE (EXCL. VAT)', currency 'koruna česká'. Status 'Awarded' but no winner in scraped tab. Deadline '28/04/2026, 08:00'. CPV 34223300-9 Přívěsy.

samples.label: CZ-NEN-TankTransporter
samples.notes: NEN portal scrape. No value in text. Quantity '6 ks návěsových souprav (tj. 6x tahač+6x návěs) k přepravě tanků min 70 t'. Status 'Not terminated' (Open). Deadline '30/03/2026, 10:00'.

samples.label: TED-EE-HeatingTrailers
samples.buyer: Riigi Kaitseinvesteeringute Keskus (Estonian Centre for Defence Investment)
samples.notes: Award for heated trailers for Moldova Army. Value '33 700,00 EUR'. Winner 'aktsiaselts RESPO HAAGISED'. Quantity '4 (neli) soojakhaagist'. Duration 'kolm (3) kuud' (3 months). Estonian text with EU TED structure.

samples.label: TED-NL-MedicalTrailers
samples.notes: Competition notice (no award yet). Estimated value '1 400 000,00 EUR'. Firm qty 28 (+ 12 optional = 40 total). Duration 15 years maintenance = 180 months. Deadline for RfP '20/06/2025 10:00'. English text, no winner.
